effect.name: Decimator
effect.description:
Decimator (LADSPA 1202)
Decimates (reduces the effective sample rate), and reduces the bit depth of the input signal, allows non integer values for smooth transitions between clean and lo-fi signals.
effect.author: Steve Harris (http://www.ladspa.org)

parameter.name: Bit Depth
parameter.comment: The bit depth that the signal will be reduced to

parameter.name: Sample Rate
parameter.comment: The sample rate that the signal will be resampled at
